title: Implement index health UI and reindex/delete actions
requirements: Add index health list filtered by corpus type, object kind, source/domain, index status, stale reason, FTS presence and vector presence.
Add search document detail with technical metadata, versions, scope/sensitivity summary, related issues, related jobs and safe access audit references.
Add dry-run reindex, enqueue reindex, retry failed index and delete stale records actions.
Delete stale FTS/vector records through existing backend services; do not mutate index files directly from views.
Write MemoryReviewAction for each index operation.
Create persistent MemoryIngestionIssue only when diagnostics require operator review.
